title: Korak 37

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: Tvoja putanja __init__ treba da koristi self.salary = Employee._base_salaries[level] umesto self._salary = Employee._base_salaries[level].

description: Sada nakon kreiranja salary setter, ispravite __init__ ili koristite umesto direktnog postavljanja vrednosti za self._salary. Promenite self._salary = Employee._base_salaries[level] u self.salary = Employee._base_salaries[level].
